section.heading: Refinancing of certain rural hospital debt

content.p: Assistance under section 1926(a) of this title for a community facility, or under section 1932 of this title, may include the refinancing of a debt obligation of a rural hospital as an eligible loan or loan guarantee purpose if the assistance would help preserve access to a health service in a rural community, meaningfully improve the financial position of the hospital, and otherwise meet the financial feasibility and adequacy of security requirements of the Rural Development Agency.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 87–128, title III, § 342, as added Pub. L. 115–334, title VI, § 6103, Dec. 20, 2018, 132 Stat. 4728.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Another section 342 of Pub. L. 87–128 amended section 1013a of this title.
